REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-02-2025 Continued To Oct-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Evan Gologorsky for Anna Howard (petitioner) (via zoom).

Mr. Gologorsky stated that they have experienced staff turnover, that he will be sending the inventory and appraisal to the Probate Referee, and that he is requesting a continuance. The matter is continued to October 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by October 14, 2025.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Sep-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Evan Gologorsky for Anna Howard, Executor (via Zoom).

Mr. Gologorsky acknowledged that the petition had not yet been filed due to oversight and apologized to the Court. He explained that the team had learned from the mistake and was working to complete the necessary filings. He requested 60 days to allow time either to file the petition for final distribution or, if needed, a petition for approval of the report of status administration. He stated that they are awaiting information about a few remaining assets, which they expect to receive within the next month.

The Court continued the matter to September 2, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 24, 2017, is admitted to probate. Anna Howard is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To Jun-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
